requests.search_purpose: Find a concrete Ghost/Wound/Lie for an exotic female slave at a flesh auction
requests.what_i_will_do_with_result: Use the result to create a new NPC with a tragic past: a fallen princess who believes she deserves her current punishment
requests.query: A fallen princess or noblewoman sold into slavery who believes she deserves her cruel punishment because of a past sin or guilt

requests.search_purpose: Find a hidden agenda and plot elements for a high-end nightclub proprietor
requests.what_i_will_do_with_result: Create a new NPC who runs a nightclub for Drow nobles but acts as a spymaster gathering blackmail material on them
requests.query: A charismatic owner or star performer of a high-class nightclub who secretly gathers blackmail and acts as a spymaster manipulating the elite guests
